name: example_scene
prompt: Slow dolly in toward the subject's face. Warm lighting flickering on features. Dust particles floating through light beams. Eyes shift subtly. Cinematic realism. 5s. Smooth, cinematic movement.
negative_prompt: text, words, letters, logos, watermarks, UI elements, buttons, overlays, modern clothing in historical scenes, anachronistic objects, cartoonish, illustrated style, blurry, distorted, morphing faces, identity shift
